Roselle Gustav.face_description: handsome and charismatic face with an air of authority
Roselle Gustav.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, elaborate emperor attire, charismatic and authoritative presence
Roselle Gustav.color_palette: imperial red, gold, white, navy blue
Roselle Gustav.source_notes: Historical figure mentioned, visual features guessed based on his status as Emperor/Consul.

Klein Moretti.eye_color: deep dark brown, appearing pitch black like the night
Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: Black Victorian tuxedo with inner lining pockets, white shirt
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: Early 20s male, black hair, brown eyes, dressed in a sharp black tuxedo and silk top hat, carrying a plain cane.
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Toggles Spirit Vision by tapping his glabella (center of forehead) twice with his index finger joint; experiences glabella spasms and exhaustion after excessive Spirit Vision use
Klein Moretti.accessories: Silver pocket watch kept in tuxedo inner lining, black cane
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Chapter 33 confirms Klein's use of a tuxedo, pocket watch, and cane. It also details the specific physical gesture he developed for Spirit Vision.

Audrey Hall.primary_clothing: Dress with frilly designs along the sleeves
Audrey Hall.face_description: delicate and youthful features, a soft jawline, and large expressive eyes
Audrey Hall.visual_anchor: late teens female, fair skin, long blonde hair, wearing a luxurious Victorian aristocratic dress, holding a cracked bronze mirror
Audrey Hall.distinguishing_features: Swirling crimson star-like tattoo on the back of her hand that fades into skin
Audrey Hall.source_notes: Physical build and hair color confirmed during her appearance in the divine hall.

Alger Wilson.primary_clothing: robe with lightning patterns embroidered on it
Alger Wilson.face_description: Rough face with a well-defined structure
Alger Wilson.visual_anchor: early 30s male, weathered skin, dark messy hair, wearing a robe embroidered with lightning patterns, holding a quirky-shaped glass bottle
Alger Wilson.color_palette: deep sea blue, silver, dark grey
Alger Wilson.distinguishing_features: Hexagonal crystal-like snowflake absorbed into his palm
Alger Wilson.source_notes: Physical description provided while he is in his underground basement.

Admiral Ludwell.primary_clothing: dark weathered naval coat, pirate captain attire, practical sea-faring boots
Admiral Ludwell.face_description: weather-beaten rough face with a strong square jawline and a sharp, intimidating gaze
Admiral Ludwell.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, tanned skin, long weather-beaten dark brown hair, wearing a dark weathered naval coat and pirate captain attire
Admiral Ludwell.color_palette: navy blue, faded black, brass, deep red
Admiral Ludwell.source_notes: Mentioned by Alger as an infamous pirate who owns the Black Tulip. Visuals completely guessed based on standard Victorian-era pirate captain archetypes.

Captain.primary_clothing: dark maritime captain's coat over a simple shirt
Captain.face_description: sharp, sea-weathered features with a stern gaze
Captain.visual_anchor: mid-30s male, tanned skin, windblown black hair, athletic build, wearing a dark maritime captain's coat
Captain.source_notes: Mentioned by Alger as the recipient who wants the Ghost Shark's blood.

Evernight Goddess.visual_anchor: ageless divine female, pale skin, long flowing black hair, wearing flowing dark robes
Evernight Goddess.distinguishing_features: Titles: Lady of Crimson, Mother of Concealment, Empress of Misfortune and Horror, Mistress of Repose and Silence. Symbolizes the Red Moon.
Evernight Goddess.source_notes: Titles and red moon symbolism explicitly stated in the text.

King George III.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, fair skin, regal authoritative face, wearing royal attire and a crown
King George III.color_palette: gold, royal blue, crimson red, white
King George III.source_notes: Described on the money note as having two mustaches.
